name: Mutual NDA
description: A standard mutual non-disclosure agreement for parties to share confidential information while evaluating a potential business relationship. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: The cover page template for the Mutual NDA, containing fillable fields for purpose, effective date, term, confidentiality period, governing law, and signature blocks.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: A comprehensive agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering service terms, restrictions, privacy, payment, termination, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: A standard service level agreement designed to be used with the Cloud Service Agreement, covering uptime targets, response time targets, service credits, and remedies.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: An agreement for early-access design partner programs, allowing a partner to access a product early in exchange for feedback and participation in the product development program.

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: A standard agreement for professional services engagements, covering service delivery, intellectual property ownership of deliverables, payment, warranties, liability, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: A data processing agreement for GDPR and international data protection compliance, covering processor/subprocessor relationships, data transfers, security incidents, audits, and deletion of personal data.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: A standard partnership agreement for business collaborations, covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment, confidentiality, indemnification, and termination.

name: Software License Agreement
description: A comprehensive agreement for licensing on-premise or installable software, covering license grants, restrictions, open source components, updates, payment, warranties, liability, and confidentiality.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A short-term agreement for prospective customers to test and evaluate a product before committing to a longer-term deal, with limited scope and easier termination terms.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: A HIPAA-compliant business associate agreement governing the use and disclosure of protected health information (PHI), covering safeguards, subcontractors, breach notification, and data rights.

name: AI Addendum
description: An addendum for agreements involving AI services, covering AI-specific terms for input/output ownership, model training restrictions, non-training improvement, and disclaimers about the nature of AI-generated content.
